marketing.sub: A bilingual appointment app for small businesses. Customers book in seconds. You spend less time on the phone.
marketing.audienceTitle: Built for small businesses that book by the hour
marketing.audienceLede: Whether you're a one-person clinic or a team of stylists, ma3ady is the quickest way to give customers a booking link they can actually use.

clinics.title: Clinics
clinics.body: Reduce no-shows with reminders that arrive on time.

salons.title: Salons & barbers
salons.body: Show only the slots you can actually take, in your timezone.

tutors.title: Tutors & coaches
tutors.body: Set your hours once. Customers book around them.

marketing.featuresLede: We picked three features to be excellent at, and skipped the rest.

twoTaps.title: Booking in two taps
twoTaps.body: No accounts. No passwords. Customers tap a service, pick a time, type their name. Done.

bilingual.title: Bilingual by default
bilingual.body: Every screen, every email, every reminder is fluent in English and Arabic. RTL layout out of the box.

pricing.title: Honest pricing
pricing.body: Free during beta. When we charge, it'll be a flat price — no per-booking fees, no surprises.

marketing.screensLede: A staff dashboard that fits in your pocket.

accounts.q: Do my customers need an account?
accounts.a: No. They can book as a guest with just a name and email. They get a link to manage or cancel — no sign-up required.

arabic.q: Does it support Arabic out of the box?
arabic.a: Yes. The whole app — admin, booking, emails, reminders — is fluent in EN and AR with right-to-left layout.

pricing.a: ma3ady is free during the beta. When we introduce paid plans, we'll charge a flat monthly price — never per booking.

payments.a: Not yet. v1 focuses on getting the booking flow right. Payments will arrive after we hear what tenants actually need.

data.a: Stored on Supabase (EU region by default), encrypted in transit and at rest. We don't sell anything to anyone.

marketing.demoCtaTitle: Try it with the demo tenant
marketing.demoCtaBody: See the booking flow end-to-end before downloading anything.

installAppHint: Manage all your bookings in one place.

available.title: Pick a service
available.subtitle: Pick a service to see times.
available.empty: This business isn’t taking bookings yet.

book.intro: Choose a time that works for you. We'll send a confirmation by email.
book.name: Full name
book.tos: I agree to the terms of service
book.noSlots: No times available in this window.
book.slotTaken: That slot just got taken — please pick another.
book.chooseSlot: Pick a time that works for you.
book.scanHint: Drag the day strip to scan two weeks at once.

confirm.title: You’re on the books
confirm.subtitle: We've sent a confirmation to {{email}}.
confirm.manageBody: Use the link below to reschedule or cancel — no account required.
confirm.shareBody: Share this booking link so they can grab the next slot.
confirm.policyDefault: Need to change plans? You can cancel from the manage link any time.

manage.title: Manage your booking
manage.invalidTitle: This link is no longer valid
manage.invalidBody: The booking may have been cancelled or the link expired. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact the business directly.
manage.subtitle: Cancel or reschedule your booking.
manage.completed: This appointment is complete. Thanks for visiting.

cancelConfirm.title: Cancel this booking?
cancelConfirm.body: This frees the slot and the link will stop working.

errors.tenantNotFoundBody: The link you followed may be out of date. Try double-checking the address.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
